publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-01-25 18:13:04 -0500.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Correspondence, publications, reports, and subject files concerning Latham's work as a professor in the Division of Nutritional Sciences and his work in international nutrition.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Professor emeritus in the Division of Nutritional Sciences, Cornell University from 1968-2004 and Director of the Cornell Program in International Nutrition for 25 years.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Correspondence, publications, reports, and subject files concerning Latham's work as a professor in the Division of Nutritional Sciences and his work in international nutrition, focusing on breastfeeding, infant and child health; parasitic infections and their relationship to health, nutrition, human rights and the World Health Organization.

arrangement.head: SERIES LIST
arrangement.p: Series III. Conference Papers, Consulting Reports, Lectures – in chronological order Box 15-25
Series VII. Visual Images, Cassette Tapes, Films Box 36

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Michael Latham papers, #29-2-3928. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access to Boxes 1-14 restricted during the lifetime of the correspondent or by the permission of the correspondent AND the Director of the Division of Nutritional Sciences

did.unittitle: Michael Latham Celebration-25 Anniversary as Director of the Cornell Program in International Nutrition

Biography of Graduate Students Who Majored in International Nutrition with Michael Latham
40 Plus Years of International Nutrition Research and Advocacy- Conducted by Michael Latham and his Colleagues and Students
Five Decades of International Nutrition Research and Advocacy Conducted by Michael Latham

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contain correspondence with former students and colleagues - in alphabetical order by last name

did.unittitle: Letters of Inquiry about the M.P.S. Degree-A-H
Letters of Inquiry about the M.P.S. Degree-J-Z

NS 306-World Food and Nutrition Problems in Perspective-Lecture
School of Nutrition -Hunger and Malnutrition in the United States

Breastfeeding-Talks, Reports, Publications and Conference Proceedings
Testimony-United States Senate on Nutrition and Human Needs
Testimony to United States Senate - Mission in Sahel Africa
Testimony-Federal Trade Commission Hearing on Trade Regulation and Rules on Food Advertising
Testimony and Proceedings-FTC vs. California Milk Producers Advisory Board
Testimony-Hearing of Barcelo Commission on Free Speech
Comparative Histories of Rickets and Kwashiorkor
Policies and Plans for Food and Nutrition Programs
Nutritional Studies in Tanzania-Latham and Stare
Pan American Health Organization Technical Advisory Committee on Nutrition
CIA Request for Proposals for Nutrition Research
Ethics of Intervention Research in Populations-Latham and Habicht

Australian Milk Biscuit-Study in South Africa
Cornell Medical College and Program in International Medicine
Cornell Women's Studies and Program on International Development and Women
Cornell Program on Policies for Science and Technology in Developing Nations
Master of Professional Studies in International Development Degree
Collaborative Educational Program in Nutrition-John Hopkins and Cornell
Center for the Analysis of World Food Issues (CAWFI) at Cornell- Evaluation Report
Subseries II. Division of Nutritional Sciences (DNS) Files
Center for Science in the Public Interest
Committee for the Support of Aamir Raza
Institute of Nutrition of Central America and Panama (INCAP)
International Center for Research on Women
International Society for Research on Human Milk and Lactation (ISRHML)
Standing Committee on Nutrition (SCN) and Administrative Committee on Coordination (ACC)
United Nations University Hunger and Society Working Group
"The Tang of Tanganyika: African Journal of the 1920's and 1930's" by Gwynneth Latham
Reprints and includes publication list with checks next to publications that are in the collection
Reprints, including some that are not listed in the publications list
Series VII. Visual Images, Cassette Tapes, Films
Photos of various scenes and people of Africa
296 slides of Indonesia Applied Nutrition - UNICEF
8 glass negatives of scenes from Africa
23- 3 1/2 x 4" lantern slides of various charts concerning nutrition, fluorosis, school feeding, etc. in Tanzania
Honorable E. Heath M.P.- Brighton Nutrition Congress
Dr. J.C. Cravioto- Brighton Nutrition Congress
CBS Radio Show done by Michael Latham on the Dimension on Health

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A film about the tragedy of infant feeding practices in the third world. The film is 26 minutes, was directed by Peter Krieg, produced in Kenya and distributed by Unifilm, of New York City.
